message:
feat(daemon): configurable heap size for faster startup (100ms → 33ms)

Heap size is the main bottleneck in instance creation.

Changes:
- Add heap_size_mb config option (default: 64MB, was 2048MB)
- Instance creation: 70ms → 4.9ms (14x faster!)
- Total startup: 100ms → 33.7ms (3x faster!)

Startup breakdown (64MB heap):
- WAMR init:         0.6ms
- Module load:      28.1ms
- Instance creation: 4.9ms
- TOTAL:            33.7ms

Heap size recommendations:
- 32MB:  Ultra-fast (2.7ms instance) - minimal scripts
- 64MB:  Fast (4.9ms instance) - typical scripts (DEFAULT)
- 256MB: Normal (17.8ms instance) - larger apps
- 2048MB: Slow (70ms instance) - memory-intensive apps

Config (.edgebox.json):
{
  "daemon": {
    "heap_size_mb": 64
  }
}
